meaning: 发现此腺的英国解剖学家]
examples: Grief is itself a medicine. — William Cowper, Charity.
The UK's most senior diplomat in Afghanistan, special envoy Sir Sherard Cowper-Coles, is leaving his post.
Absence of occupation is not rest, a mind quite vacant is a mind distress. (William Cowper, British poet).
Cowper suffered all his life from depression and even from the occasional bout of madness.
Although such men as Benjamin Franklin greatly admired Cowper's poetry, after he died his renown quickly faded.
